codeSystems.name: BeVSBodyTopography
codeSystems.title: BeVSBodyTopography
codeSystems.description: Body topography value set - describes the location or relative position on the body (e.g., superior/inferior, medial/lateral, internal/external). Placeholder valueset - the normative definition will be published in the Belgian terminology IG.
